variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 18160 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 18160 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 18160 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 223.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 180.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 124.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 426.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 424.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 27.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26483 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18160
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF26483 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18160
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF26483 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
